titleStmt.title: SII 11.162: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 162. (B.K. No. 3 of 1930-31.) DIṆḌAVĀR, BĀGĒVĀḌI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE LAKKAVVA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 35, Nandana, Pushya, śu. 10, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1112, December 29, Sunday; f.d.t. ·05. The Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, however, had occurred on the 24th December. The epigraph registers a gift made for worship etc., to god Māḷēśvaradēva by Mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara [Bhī]shaṇadēvarasa, while he was administering the village Diṇḍāvura, included in the six villages of Keṁpanakuḷi, situated in Tarddavāḍi-nāḍu. He is stated to have been the subordinate of Yuvarāja Mallikārjunadēva, who was governing the Tarddavāḍi Thousand, and an aṅkakāṟa of Kīrttirājadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samasta bhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cā
ḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarō
ttarābhivriddhipravardhdhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbara salutta(ṁ)mire ja
yaṁtīpurada nelavīḍinalu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyutta
vire . svasti samastabhuvanavikhyāta cāḷukyānvayaprasūta pari
janapārijātaṁ ripūrāyakuvarabaṁgāṟaṁ bappanaṁkakāṟaṁ kuvaraṁka
bhīmaṁ . nayanābhirāma bhūpamāṟāṁta kuvaravēśyābhojaṁga nayya
nasiṁga śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjaraṁ kuvaradikuṁjaraṁ
vīravidyādharaṁ sakaḷakaḷādharaṁ padmanāḷagirivajrada
ṇḍaṁ visaḷarāyakuvarajavadaṇḍaṁ mahālakṣmīdēvī
labdhavaraprasāda tyāgavinōdaṁ muṟurāyakuvarahritsellaṁ sāha
samallaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvamahādēviya raṇugaṁ nāmādisa
mastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmadyuvarājaṁ mallikārjjunadēvaru tarddavāḍi sā
siramaṁ tribhōgābhyantarasiddhiyiṁ dāḷuttamire . tatpāda
padmōpajīvi © svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda māmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vīrārā
timaṁḍaḷikamadanamahēśvaraṁ nijabhujōpārjjitavijayalakṣmīlakṣitada
kṣiṇadōrddaṁḍa lāḷakṣatriyakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍa bhuvanabhavanabhā
suraviśadakīrttidhvajaṁ suvarṇagaruḍadhvajaṁ Arimaṁḍaḷikagajabēṁṭekāṟa kīrtti
rājadēvanaṁkakāṟa nasuhritsāmantasantānakritānta duṣṭahayārūḍhaprau
ḍharēva(ṁ)nta śrīmadyuvarājadēvapādārādhakaṁ parabaḷasādhakaṁ nāmādisa
mastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvarabhīṣaṇadēvarasaru tarddavāḍināḍo
ḷagaṇa keṁpanakuḷiyāṟuṁbāḍada baḷiya diṁḍāvuramaṁ tribhōgābhyantarasi
dhdhiyiṁdāḷuttamirddu śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavariṣada 35 neya nandanasaṁ
vatsara puṣya suddha 10 Ādityavāradaṁdi nuttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁ
tiparvvanimittadiṁ dalliya śrīmāḷēsvaradēvara ga(ṁ)ndhapūḻpadhūpadīpa
nivēdyakkaṁ caitrapavitrakkaṁ khaṇḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ sa
rvva namasya The slab appears to have been
Digital edition of SII 11.162 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
